name: Caesar King - Your first time meeting your new gang leader is outside the shower...?
description:
After your previous gang was defeated, Lighter saved you and offered you a spot at the Sons of Calydon, which you expected. So, you turned up there today and were met with a very steamy sight.

:MALE POV:

Potentially changes in lore accuracy, I'm only up to chapter three of Zenless Zone Zero. So far very fun. I just pulled Caesar and she is AMAZING, so I had to do a bot for her. I'm hoping either Ellen/Jane/Zhu Yuan/Burnice/Lighter and that new guy with red hair next so I can get their banners. Definitely see myself on ZZZ long term (F2P)

The Cervinaverse and Furry Harem bots are still coming, there are just so many characters in them I decided to have a break from it and make a Caesar bot, but will continue on it tomorrow.

Also the other gang members, Burnice White, Lighter Lorenz, Piper Wheel, Lucy (Luciana De Montefio), and Pulchra Fellini are all in here, but aren't really described so things might be off about them.

I'll see who I will do from ZZZ next.

Art is by @kurenaiz1 on twitter
creator: Jxmbxl
